text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gah! I thought this one was in the<n>bag!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's what you're thinking, right?!<n>But don't you
fret! I have luck on my<n>side!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
When I saw my time in today's race,<n>my lucky
number happened to be<n>there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'm definitely going to<n>win next
time... In fact, consider it<n>already won!
choice_data_list: Make sure you still give your best at practice.
Make sure you still give your best at practice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'm definitely going to<n>win next
time... In fact, consider it<n>already won!
choice_data_list: Make sure you still give your best at practice.
Make sure you still give your best at practice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm riding on a treasure ship with the<n>seven gods
of fortune, so sit back<n>and watch the luck come
rolling in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Crash! Splash! More and moretreasures, riding the waves my way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, haha! But of course! I'll give it my<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I take these things<n>very
seriously! Serious is my middle<n>name!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, hold on a minute! Where did my<n>left cleat
go?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No no no... That's my lucky cleat!<n>Wh-where'd it
go?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
More challenges are sure to lie<n>ahead. We resolve
to work harder to<n>bring more fortunate results in
the<n>future.
